summary: Completed frontend testing of WayofDojo Junior Dashboard with new SIDEBAR RPG / GAMING layout. All requested features verified: Login flow, RPG Sidebar layout with character card, virtue progress bars, active quests, CONTINUER button toggling JourneyPath, Tanaka Hero section, action cards navigation, and 7 Vertus du Budo section.
critical_code_review_comments: JuniorDashboard.tsx correctly implements SIDEBAR RPG / GAMING layout with left sidebar and main content area
All data-testid attributes properly implemented (30+ elements verified)
Character card displays avatar, name (Bruno), grade (6e Kyu), XP (150/400), and stats (Série, Badges, Techniques)
Virtue progress bars show 4 virtues (Respect, Courage, Maîtrise, Humilité) with levels
Quêtes Actives section shows 4 quests with XP rewards and expandable details
CONTINUER button toggles JourneyPath visibility correctly
Tanaka Hero section displays portrait image and 'Écouter le message' button
Action cards (Dojo Virtuel, Techniques, Trophées) navigate correctly to respective pages
7 Vertus du Budo section displays all 7 kanji characters with virtue names and levels
Floating 'Parle-moi' button with Tanaka avatar visible in bottom right corner
seed_data_creation: No seed data created - using existing test users
context_for_next_testing_agent: Junior Dashboard SIDEBAR RPG layout fully tested. Layout uses flexbox with left sidebar (w-72 lg:w-80) and main content area. All interactive elements have data-testid attributes. Tanaka intro modal appears when clicking CONTINUER button to show JourneyPath. Navigation cards work correctly for Techniques, Dojo Virtuel, and Trophées pages.
